title: 2 arrested in Eastern Cape for kidnapping 70-year-old woman
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Two suspects have been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Two suspects have been arrested in connection with the kidnapping of a 73-year-old woman in the Eastern Cape.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Two suspects have been arrested in connection with the kidnapping of a 73-year-old woman in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The duo were handcuffed on Monday during an operation led by the Gqeberha base Serious Organised Crime Investigation of the Hawks, Crime Intelligence, Local Criminal Record Centre (LCRC), Magma security and Investigation.","html":"The duo were handcuffed on Monday during an operation led by the Gqeberha base Serious Organised Crime Investigation of the Hawks, Crime Intelligence, Local Criminal Record Centre (LCRC), Magma security and Investigation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Rescue"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hawks spokesperson Warrant Officer Ndiphiwe Mhlakuvana said the elderly woman was reportedly abducted on Monday 11 August at Crocus Street in Kariega.","html":"Hawks spokesperson Warrant Officer Ndiphiwe Mhlakuvana said the elderly woman was reportedly abducted on Monday 11 August at Crocus Street in Kariega."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Investigation ensued, due to the pressure exerted by a multi-disciplinary team resulted in the victim being released on 16 August, where she was found near Kariega police station unharmed and reunited with her family.”","html":"“Investigation ensued, due to the pressure exerted by a multi-disciplinary team resulted in the victim being released on 16 August, where she was found near Kariega police station unharmed and reunited with her family.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Arrest"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mhlakuvana said an intelligence-driven operation was conducted, which led the team to the suspect’s homestead in various precincts at Gqeberha, which were believed to have been responsible for the kidnapping.","html":"Mhlakuvana said an intelligence-driven operation was conducted, which led the team to the suspect’s homestead in various precincts at Gqeberha, which were believed to have been responsible for the kidnapping."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The joint team swiftly managed to arrest two suspects aged between 29 and 31, who were positively linked with the abduction of the senior citizen.","html":"“The joint team swiftly managed to arrest two suspects aged between 29 and 31, who were positively linked with the abduction of the senior citizen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Furthermore, the team reportedly recovered an undisclosed huge amount of cash, two vehicles and two firearms that were suspected to have been used in the kidnapping incident and were seized for further investigation,” Mhlakuvana said.","html":"“Furthermore, the team reportedly recovered an undisclosed huge amount of cash, two vehicles and two firearms that were suspected to have been used in the kidnapping incident and were seized for further investigation,” Mhlakuvana said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Kidnapping"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Mhlakuvana, it is alleged that the woman was coming out of the gate of her homestead, driving a motor vehicle, when she was apparently blocked by a Volkswagen Polo and the two armed suspects.","html":"According to Mhlakuvana, it is alleged that the woman was coming out of the gate of her homestead, driving a motor vehicle, when she was apparently blocked by a Volkswagen Polo and the two armed suspects."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“They alighted from the vehicle, accosted the victim into their vehicle and fled from the scene. On the same day, it is further alleged that a ransom demand was made by the suspect and the matter was handed over to the Hawks for probing.”","html":"“They alighted from the vehicle, accosted the victim into their vehicle and fled from the scene. On the same day, it is further alleged that a ransom demand was made by the suspect and the matter was handed over to the Hawks for probing.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mhlakuvana said the suspects are expected to appear before the Kariega Magistrate’s on 19 and 20 August, respectively.","html":"Mhlakuvana said the suspects are expected to appear before the Kariega Magistrate’s on 19 and 20 August, respectively."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Provincial Head of the Hawks, Major General Mboiki Obed Ngwenya, lauded the investigating team for ensuring that the “suspects are brought before the arm of the law.”","html":"The Provincial Head of the Hawks, Major General Mboiki Obed Ngwenya, lauded the investigating team for ensuring that the “suspects are brought before the arm of the law.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: 2 arrested in Eastern Cape for kidnapping 70-year-old woman
